title: AI Automation
kicker: Less manual work, better response systems
summary: AI-assisted workflows for customer support, order handling, lead capture, follow-ups, and connected business operations.
description: I design automation workflows that connect messages, forms, spreadsheets, databases, and AI tools so businesses can respond faster and keep information organized.
Automation is treated as one part of a larger system: the workflow must fit the business process, handle edge cases, and remain understandable for the team using it.
outcomes: A documented workflow that can evolve
